message:
fix: restore original foreignObject icon rendering (remove crossOrigin) (#5376)

The crossOrigin="anonymous" attribute broke GitHub avatar loading
because the github.com → avatars.githubusercontent.com 302 redirect
doesn't include CORS headers. Restored the exact original foreignObject
structure that was working 2 weeks ago (from commit 0601439c).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
